briefdescription.para: The optional frame title.
Padding between frame and content.
Create a frame layout.
Access the frame title.
Replace the frame title.
Access the padding between frame and content.
Replace the padding between frame and content.
Measure this surface for a proposed size.

detaileddescription.para:
The returned layout sizes describe the margin-free content rectangle. The optional margins in the returned metrics are recommendations for the parent layout and are not included in these sizes.
scope
Measurement access for child surfaces.
proposal
The proposed size.
The measured layout metrics.

briefdescription.para: Layout direct children within this surface.

parameterdescription.para: Layout access for measuring and placing child surfaces.

briefdescription.para: Test if this surface paints every cell in its rectangle.

simplesect.para: true if the surface is opaque.

briefdescription.para: Paint this surface into the target buffer.

parameterdescription.para: The paint context for the current paint pass.

briefdescription.para: Create a frame layout.
Initialize theme attributes after construction.
Calculate the content rectangle for a surface size.

memberdef.argsstring: (const SurfacePtr &content, MeasureScope &scope, LayoutProposal proposal, Margins &contentInset) const noexcept -> LayoutMetrics
memberdef.name: measureContent

briefdescription.para: Measure the content with collapsed padding and child margins.

memberdef.argsstring: (const LayoutMetrics &contentMetrics, const ThemeContext &themeContext, Margins contentInset) const
memberdef.name: framedMetrics

briefdescription.para: Add frame and collapsed content inset to content metrics.
Build the rendered title block.
Draw the title into the top border.
Calculate the size consumed by the frame border and padding.
Create a child proposal by removing border and the collapsed content inset.
A one-child layout that surrounds its content with a themed frame and optional title.
